subject: DSA
title: Arrays
notes: Fundamental data structure for storing elements of the same type. Practice problems involving traversal, searching, and manipulation.

subject: DSA
title: Strings
notes: String manipulation, pattern matching, and algorithms like KMP, Rabin-Karp.

subject: DSA
title: Linked Lists
notes: Singly and doubly linked lists, cycle detection, reversal, and merging.

subject: DSA
title: Stacks
notes: LIFO data structure, applications in expression evaluation, parentheses matching.

subject: DSA
title: Queues
notes: FIFO data structure, priority queues, and deque operations.

subject: DSA
title: Binary Trees
notes: Tree traversals (inorder, preorder, postorder), height, diameter, and path problems.

subject: DSA
title: Binary Search Trees
notes: BST operations, validation, lowest common ancestor, and inorder successor.

subject: DSA
title: Graphs
notes: Graph representations, BFS, DFS, shortest paths, and topological sort.

subject: DSA
title: Dynamic Programming
notes: Memoization, tabulation, knapsack, longest common subsequence, and matrix chain multiplication.

subject: DSA
title: Greedy Algorithms
notes: Activity selection, Huffman coding, and fractional knapsack problems.

subject: DSA
title: Backtracking
notes: N-Queens, Sudoku solver, and subset generation problems.

subject: DSA
title: Sorting Algorithms
notes: Quick sort, merge sort, heap sort, and their time/space complexities.

subject: DSA
title: Searching Algorithms
notes: Binary search, linear search, and interpolation search.

subject: DSA
title: Hashing
notes: Hash tables, collision handling, and applications in caching.

subject: DSA
title: Bit Manipulation
notes: Bit operations, counting set bits, and power of two checks.

subject: DSA
title: Recursion
notes: Recursive thinking, base cases, and tail recursion.

subject: DSA
title: Divide and Conquer
notes: Merge sort, quick sort, and binary search implementations.

subject: DSA
title: Two Pointers
notes: Array problems with two pointers, sliding window technique.

subject: DSA
title: Sliding Window
notes: Maximum sum subarray, longest substring without repeating characters.

subject: DSA
title: Heaps
notes: Priority queues, heap sort, and k-largest elements problems.

subject: DSA
title: Tries
notes: Prefix trees for string operations and autocomplete.

subject: DBMS
title: Relational Databases
notes: ER modeling, normalization, keys, and schema design for relational database systems.

subject: DBMS
title: SQL and Querying
notes: Select, join, aggregate, subquery, and set operations to retrieve and manipulate relational data.

subject: DBMS
title: Transactions and Indexing
notes: ACID properties, locking, isolation levels, indexing strategies, and query optimization.

subject: OS
title: Process and Thread Management
notes: Process life cycle, thread models, CPU scheduling, context switching, and multitasking.

subject: OS
title: Memory Management
notes: Virtual memory, paging, segmentation, allocation strategies, and page replacement algorithms.

subject: OS
title: Synchronization and File Systems
notes: Concurrency control, semaphores, deadlocks, file organization, and storage management.

subject: DBMS
title: Normalization and Schema Design
notes: Normal forms, redundancy elimination, and designing efficient, consistent relational schemas.

subject: DBMS
title: NoSQL and NewSQL
notes: Key-value, document, columnar, and graph databases plus modern scalable NewSQL systems.

subject: DBMS
title: Backup, Recovery, and Replication
notes: Recovery techniques, log-based recovery, checkpoints, backup strategies, and database replication.

subject: DBMS
title: Distributed Databases
notes: Partitioning, replication, CAP theorem, consistency models, and distributed query processing.

subject: DBMS
title: Database Security
notes: Authentication, authorization, encryption, SQL injection prevention, and auditing.

subject: OS
title: CPU Scheduling
notes: Scheduling algorithms, time-sharing, priority scheduling, and scheduler performance metrics.

subject: OS
title: Deadlocks and Concurrency
notes: Deadlock detection, prevention, avoidance, and concurrency control mechanisms.

subject: OS
title: Virtualization and Containers
notes: Hypervisors, virtual machines, containerization, and resource isolation techniques.

subject: OS
title: I/O Systems and Device Management
notes: I/O hardware, buffering, interrupts, and device driver concepts.

subject: OS
title: Operating System Architecture
notes: Monolithic, microkernel, layered, and hybrid architectures plus system services.
